commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Feishu final-reply dispatch so over-limit final text bypasses the streaming-card close path, discards any active preview, and falls back to existing chunked message/card delivery with regression tests.

PR surface: Source +3, Tests +52. Total +55 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? No live reproduction was run here; current-main source shows final Feishu streaming replies can bypass chunking, and the linked issue provides concrete Feishu steps for the observed truncation.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is live Feishu proof or maintainer validation, not a concrete code repair for ClawSweeper to apply.

target.title: fix(feishu): preserve long streaming replies
target.body:
## Summary

- Keep oversized Feishu final replies off the streaming-card path when they exceed the configured text chunk limit.
- Discard any active streaming preview before delivering the oversized final reply through the existing chunked message/card send path.
- Add focused coverage for oversized plain final replies and partial-preview cleanup.

Fixes #88631.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/feishu/src/reply-dispatcher.test.ts`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check extensions/feishu/src/reply-dispatcher.ts extensions/feishu/src/reply-dispatcher.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Feishu streaming no longer routes oversized plain final replies into a single streaming card element that can exceed CardKit content limits.
Real environment tested: Local Feishu dispatcher tests with Feishu streaming session and send APIs mocked.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/feishu/src/reply-dispatcher.test.ts`
Evidence after fix: The targeted dispatcher suite passed with 65 tests, including oversized final reply fallback and active preview discard coverage.
Observed result after fix: Oversized final text is delivered through existing chunked `sendMessageFeishu` delivery instead of closing into a streaming card.
What was not tested: A live Feishu tenant/CardKit API call was not run.
target.author: monkeyleet
